top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT buildUpPlayPassingClass AS passing_class
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id IN (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team
    WHERE team_long_name = 'CLB' OR team_short_name = 'CLB'
);

SELECT DISTINCT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'CLB' OR t.team_short_name = 'CLB';

SELECT DISTINCT buildUpPlayPassingClass AS passing_class
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id IN (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team
    WHERE team_long_name = 'CLB' OR team_short_name = 'CLB'
);

SELECT DISTINCT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'CLB' OR t.team_short_name = 'CLB';

SELECT DISTINCT buildUpPlayPassingClass AS passing_class
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id IN (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team
    WHERE team_long_name = 'CLB' OR team_short_name = 'CLB'
);
